mapper.select: SELECT t.NODE_ID , t.NODE_NM , t.PARENT_ID , IFNULL(AVG(ed.SCORE), 0) AS domainScore , COUNT(ed.DTL_ID) AS totalCount FROM TW_TREE t LEFT JOIN TW_EVAL_DTL ed ON t.NODE_ID = ed.NODE_ID AND ed.EVAL_ID = #{evalId} WHERE t.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY t.NODE_ID, t.NODE_NM, t.PARENT_ID ORDER BY t.SORT_ORD
SELECT im.* , t.NODE_NM FROM TW_IMPROVE im LEFT JOIN TW_EVAL_DTL ed ON im.DTL_ID = ed.DTL_ID LEFT JOIN TW_TREE t ON ed.NODE_ID = t.NODE_ID ORDER BY im.REG_DT DESC LIMIT 10
